questionHtml:
What is the order of increasing size of muscle structures?

A. muscle, muscle fibre, myofibril, sarcomere

B. myofibril, muscle fibre, sarcomere, muscle

C. sarcomere, myofibril, muscle fibre, muscle

D. muscle fibre, sarcomere, myofibril, muscle

meta.title: What is the order of increasing size of muscle structures? A. muscle, muscle fibre, myofibril, sarcomere B. myofibril, muscle fibre, sarcomere, muscle C. sarcomere, myofibril, musc
